---
title: "Course Content"
---

Every session has its own page. Each one pairs a **Lecture Notes** reading with a hands-on **R Lab** and — when due — **homework**, a **practice** quiz, a graded **Module Quiz**, and **project** milestones. For the full grid of what is due when, see the [Schedule](/schedule.qmd).

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
**Each session page gives you:** an overview, the session's learning objectives, its deep-linked materials (reading · lab · homework · practice · quiz · project), and a key-concepts glossary.
:::

## Welcome

| Session | Topic |
|:--:|---|
| 1 | [Orientation & R Setup](01-content.qmd) |

## Part I · Foundations of Linear Regression

| Session | Topic |
|:--:|---|
| 2 | [Simple Linear Regression](02-content.qmd) |
| 3 | [Dummies & the *t*-Test](03-content.qmd) |
| 4 | [ANCOVA & Statistical Control](04-content.qmd) |

## Part II · Extensions of Linear Regression

| Session | Topic |
|:--:|---|
| 5 | [One-Way ANOVA](05-content.qmd) |
| 6 | [Continuous Predictors](06-content.qmd) |
| 7 | [Interactions & Simple Slopes](07-content.qmd) |
| 8 | [Two-Way ANOVA](08-content.qmd) |
| 9 | [Nonlinear Relationships](09-content.qmd) |

## Part III · Model Evaluation

| Session | Topic |
|:--:|---|
| 10 | [Model Building & Diagnostics](10-content.qmd) |

## Part IV · Categorical Outcomes

| Session | Topic |
|:--:|---|
| 11 | [Simple Logistic Regression](11-content.qmd) |
| 12 | [Multiple Logistic Regression](12-content.qmd) |
| 13 | [Logistic Diagnostics & Simpson's Paradox](13-content.qmd) |
| 14 | [GLM Framework & Ordinal Models](14-content.qmd) |

## Synthesis

| Session | Topic |
|:--:|---|
| 15 | [Course Synthesis: SLR → MLR → GLM](15-content.qmd) |
